title: The No-Cloning Theorem: Why Quantum Information is Unique
description: Discover why quantum states cannot be perfectly copied - a fundamental theorem with profound implications for quantum computing, cryptography, and the nature of quantum information.
learningObjectives: State and prove the no-cloning theorem
Understand why linearity of quantum mechanics forbids cloning
Explore the implications for quantum cryptography
Distinguish between cloning and state preparation
Understand approximate and probabilistic cloning limits
